notes: Final: Mexico 2-0 South Africa. Goals: Julian Quinones 9', Raul Jimenez 66'. Red cards: Sphephelo Sithole 49' and Themba Zwane 84' for South Africa; Cesar Montes 90+2' for Mexico.

Final: South Korea 2-1 Czechia. Czechia led through Ladislav Krejci 59'; South Korea scored through Hwang In-beom 67' and Oh Hyeon-gyu 80'. Czechia had a Tomas Soucek goal ruled out for offside at 76'.

Final: Canada 1-1 Bosnia-Herzegovina. Goals: Jovo Lukic 21' for Bosnia-Herzegovina; Cyle Larin 78' for Canada. Yellow cards: Alistair Johnston 11' and Luc de Fougerolles 54' for Canada; Ermedin Demirovic 45' and Jovo Lukic 45+1' for Bosnia-Herzegovina. No red cards reported by source.

Final: United States 4-1 Paraguay. Goals: Damian Bobadilla own goal 7' for United States; Folarin Balogun 31' and 45+5' for United States; Mauricio 73' for Paraguay; Gio Reyna 90+8' for United States. U.S. Soccer reports USA outshot Paraguay 16-9 and allowed one shot on goal. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Qatar 1-1 Switzerland. Goals: Breel Embolo for Switzerland; Boualem Khoukhi stoppage-time equalizer for Qatar. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Brazil 1-1 Morocco. Goals: Ismael Saibari 21' for Morocco; Vinicius Junior 32' for Brazil. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Haiti 0-1 Scotland. Goal: John McGinn 28' for Scotland. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Australia 2-0 Turkey. Goals: Nestory Irankunda 27' and Connor Metcalfe 75' for Australia. No red cards reported by source.

Final: Germany 7-1 Curaçao. Goals: Felix Nmecha 6', Nico Schlotterbeck 38', Kai Havertz 45+5' pen and 88', Jamal Musiala 47', Nathaniel Brown 68', Deniz Undav 78' for Germany; Livano Comenencia 21' for Curaçao. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Ivory Coast 1-0 Ecuador. Goal: Amad Diallo 90' for Ivory Coast. Yellow cards reported in live source include Franck Kessie 38' and Doue for Ivory Coast. No red cards reported by source.

Final: Netherlands 2-2 Japan. Goals: Virgil van Dijk 51' and Crysencio Summerville 64' for Netherlands; Keito Nakamura 57' and Daichi Kamada 89' for Japan. Yellow card: Crysencio Summerville 61' for Netherlands. No red cards reported by source.

Final: Sweden 5-1 Tunisia. Goals: Yasin Ayari 7' and 90+6' for Sweden; Alexander Isak 30' for Sweden; Viktor Gyokeres 59' for Sweden; Mattias Svanberg 86' for Sweden; Omar Rekik 43' for Tunisia. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Belgium 1-1 Egypt. Goals: Emam Ashour 19' for Egypt; Mohamed Hany own goal 66' for Belgium. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Iran 2-2 New Zealand. New Zealand goals: Elijah Just brace. Iran goals: Ramin Rezaeian and Mohammad Mohebi. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Spain 0-0 Cape Verde Islands. No goals. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Saudi Arabia 1-1 Uruguay. Goals: Saudi Arabia and Uruguay drew 1-1; reports credit Saudi Arabia's Al-Amri and Uruguay's Maximiliano Araujo. No red cards reported by source.
Final: France 3-1 Senegal. Goals: Kylian Mbappe 66' and 90+6' for France; Bradley Barcola 82' for France; Ibrahim Mbaye 90+5' for Senegal. No red cards reported by source.
Final: Iraq 1-4 Norway. FOX and ESPN report Norway won 4-1; Guardian recap notes Haaland scored twice and Iraq equalized through Hussein before Norway pulled away.
Final: Argentina 3-0 Algeria. Guardian recap reports a commanding Argentina win; ABC score centre lists Argentina 3, Algeria 0.

Final: Austria 3-1 Jordan. ESPN and ABC list Austria 3, Jordan 1; Guardian recap reports Romano Schmid scored for Austria, Ali Olwan equalized for Jordan, Austria retook the lead through an own goal, and Marko Arnautovic added a late penalty.
Final: Portugal 1-1 Congo DR. Goals: Joao Neves 6' for Portugal; Yoane Wissa 45+5' for Congo DR. No red cards reported by source.
